title: ProxyAnnounce
description: Announce stuff on your mc servers using the proxy console
body:
# ProxyAnnounce

A lightweight yet powerful Velocity proxy plugin that enables seamless communication across your entire Minecraft network.

## 🌟 Features

### Network-Wide Announcements
Send important messages to all players across every server in your network with a single command. Perfect for server-wide announcements, events, maintenance notifications, and more.

### Rich Text Formatting
Take advantage of full MiniMessage format support to create eye-catching announcements with colors, formatting, and styling that captures your players' attention.

### Permission-Based Access
Ensure only authorized staff members can broadcast messages with the dedicated permission system. Control exactly who can make announcements across your network.

### Customizable Prefix
Personalize your announcements with a fully customizable prefix that matches your server's branding and style.

### Logging & Monitoring
All announcements are properly logged, making it easy to keep track of what's being communicated to your players and by whom.

### Lightweight Performance
Built specifically for Velocity with performance in mind, this plugin operates with minimal resource usage while handling your network communication needs.

## 🔧 Simple Configuration

The plugin uses a clean TOML configuration file for easy setup and customization:

```toml
[message]
prefix = "[&b&lAnnouncement&r] "
use_mini_message = true
default_color = "yellow"
default_decorations = ["bold"]
```

## 💬 Usage

Simple command syntax makes it easy for staff to send announcements:

```
/say <message>
```

Required permission: `proxyannounce.say`

## 🚀 Why Choose This Plugin?

In large Minecraft networks, communication is key. This tool solves the common challenge of needing to relay important information to players spread across multiple servers. Rather than forcing administrators to connect to each server individually or requiring complex workarounds, this solution provides a straightforward way to reach your entire player base instantly.

The plugin stands out with its perfect balance of simplicity and flexibility. The clean codebase ensures compatibility and stability with your Velocity proxy setup, while the formatting options give you the creative freedom to design announcements that reflect your server's unique style.

Whether you're announcing a special event, notifying players about maintenance, or sharing important updates, this communication tool will become an essential part of your network's administrative toolkit.

## 📋 Planned Features

- Auto-announcements on a configurable timer
- Multiple announcement channels with different formatting
- Player-specific announcement targeting
- Clickable actions in announcements
- Enhanced placeholders support

## 🔒 Permissions

- `proxyannounce.say` - Allows the use of the /say command

## ⚙️ Compatibility

- Built for **Velocity** NEWEST VERS
- Compatible with all Minecraft versions supported by Velocity
